name: Puffer Bounce
short_description: Puffer bounces is an old style arcade game. The pufferfish doesn't stop and there's always a bounce on the ground. Help him move on safely with your reaction speed and proper controls.
detailed_description:
I don't know why, but the baby pufferfish is always bouncing on the floor.
There's never been a pause!
Delicate manipulation will be needed to safely take the baby pufferfish to its destination.
Help baby pufferfish reach their destination safely through proper response speed and control.

It re-interpreted the classic game BouncingBall and contains several unique stages.
You can play it lightly, but you can also build up your skills through many attempts if you want.
Challenge yourself to speedrun!


✸ 50 different stage levels.
✸ Experience simple manipulation and a variety of gimmicks.
✸ Solve the puzzle using special tiles in many ways.
✸ Collect coins from every stage!
✸ Challenge Clear Record with the shortest time!
